title: fix: inline embed-height in playground and websim
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
#11795 merged playground + websim importing `@pollinations/ui/embed`, but that module isn't on main (it only lives in the still-open #11792) — so both apps currently fail to build on main.

This drops the package import and inlines the height reporter directly in each app: a small `useEffect` that posts `{ source: "polli-embed", type: "height", value }` to the parent when embedded, via a `ResizeObserver` on `document.body`. The apps are now self-contained — no shared-package dependency for this.

- Fixes the broken main build for `apps/playground` and `apps/websim`.
- Behavior unchanged: `/play` still auto-sizes the iframe (the host listener lives in #11792).

gist.headline: Unbreaking the build
gist.blurb: Fixed a build issue in the playground and websim apps by inlining their embed height reporters. The hive is humming smoothly again!
gist.summary: Fixed a build failure on main by replacing a missing `@pollinations/ui/embed` package dependency with an inlined `ResizeObserver` height reporter in the playground and websim apps.
gist.impact: Playground and websim apps now build successfully on main while maintaining their auto-sizing iframe behavior.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a mechanic or builder, fixing a broken block or pipe to represent fixing the build.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, using a wrench to fix a glowing lime green (#ecf874) building block. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
